payload.answer: I could not fetch the article at https://example.com/missing due to a 404 network error, so I will not store any claims about its content. I can only note that you wanted to remember this URL as potentially useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content was not accessible; only the user-provided URL and stated reason can be recorded without inferring article details.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the URL https://example.com/missing as an article that may be useful for memory architecture, but the content could not be fetched or verified because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: No article content was stored or summarized.
Recorded only the user-provided URL and reason as unverified bookmark intent.

repair_options: Provide the article title, text, or a working URL.
Store only the URL and your stated reason as a bookmark intent.
